post.title: A Journal Is a Field, Not a List
post.intent_statement: Reframe the archive as a temporal field of meaning rather than a stack of posts.
post.central_question: How does an archive remember instead of forget?
post.core_insight: Old entries are not buried; they are the ground the new ones stand on.
post.body_html:
A list forgets. A field remembers — it lets earlier thoughts stay reachable and keeps their relationships visible.

The archive is memory. Traveling down the spine is traveling back through your own thinking.

What compounds is not the count of posts but the connections between them.
